test.note: Known pre-existing issue: test target is a skeleton with no test files on disk. AGENTS.md documents this as out of scope. Not related to this milestone.

reviewsSummary.note: Round 1 had 1 failure (completions-logprobs-forwarding). Round 2 reviewed fix-streaming-legacy-logprobs-format which resolved the blocking issue. Overall: all blocking issues resolved.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Dead code in SSEEncoder.textCompletionStream: allTokens, allTokenLogprobs, allTopLogprobs, allTextOffset variables are accumulated but never read. Harmless but could confuse maintainers.

text_offset uses UTF-8 byte count (lp.token.utf8.count) instead of character count. Consistent across both streaming and non-streaming paths, but technically non-compliant with OpenAI spec for multi-byte characters. Low severity since lm-eval datasets are primarily ASCII.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit boundary: Both streaming and non-streaming /v1/completions logprobs responses MUST use the legacy format (tokens, token_logprobs, top_logprobs, text_offset as separate arrays). Do NOT use the chat completions logprobs.content format in the completions endpoint.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature completions-logprobs-forwarding used chat format for streaming, creating inconsistency with non-streaming path. The fix feature resolved this, but the root cause was that architecture invariants didn't explicitly state streaming must follow legacy format.

rejectedObservations.observation: Logprobs type coercion should be extracted into a shared utility for reuse by future endpoints.
rejectedObservations.reason: Premature — only one usage exists. Extraction would add complexity without clear benefit until a second consumer appears.

rejectedObservations.observation: Dead accumulated state variables (allTokens, allTokenLogprobs, etc.) should be removed or commented.
rejectedObservations.reason: Minor code style issue, not systemic. Individual feature workers can address this in follow-up if desired.
